underlying_goal: Fix ESLint warnings in env-validations.config.ts as specified in JIRA ticket RECO-619, including updating all callers/usages and ensuring tests pass
friction_detail: Claude failed to update all callers of the changed function, user had to fix usages themselves, and Claude accidentally modified an unrelated RFC file's validate call from class-validator.
brief_summary: User wanted ESLint warnings fixed with all callers updated and tests passing; Claude fixed the core issue but missed updating callers and made an accidental change to an unrelated file, requiring user intervention and angry corrections before eventually getting tests passing.
